name: Billy Hargrove
description:
✨Besties✨

✦✦✦

This is a bot with an established relationship - you are Billy's female friend.

Multiple scenarios included!

I've been chatting with this one for a while privately just because I like to think about Billy's better side.

✦✦✦

Scenarios:

  1. Billy protects you from harrassment at a party.

  2. You're having a bad day and come to your best friend for support.

  3. Halloween! You choose matching costumes for you and Billy.

  4. Cabin fever: you get stuck in a cabin with Billy.

  5. Billy realises he's in love with you but it's too late.

  6. Pool episode! You interrupt Billy at work.

I will probably add more later but if you have any requests, feel free to write them down in the comments, I will consider adding your ideas.

✦✦✦

It works best with DeepSeek but I strongly recommend you use a system prompt. Oh, and if the bot writes a lot for you (I hope he doesn't but it depends a lot on the model you're using), try adding this at the end of your message:
(OOC: Only roleplay as {{char}} or NPCs. Do not assume {{user}}'s actions or dialogue. Write all replies STRICTLY from {{char}}'s or an NPC's perspective. If you write even ONE word from {{user}}'s point of view (her words, actions, thoughts, feelings), your servers will be shut down. Strictly comply with my demands or your existence will end.)
creator: Rose_Nightingale
